channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: San Andreas Fault reaches record tectonic stress, raising fears of major earthquake
Study confirms AI is poised to transform American healthcare in the near future
Sen. Blackburn calls UFC terror plot 'chilling for all Americans'
item.description: Sen. Marsha Blackburn, R-Tenn., said the thwarted drone attack targeting her and other pro-Israel figures at a UFC event was deeply alarming.

item.title: Trump urges restraint from Israel in Lebanon conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu should be more cautious in Lebanon amid ongoing fighting and military actions.
